name: Interaction Protocol Shapes Moral Judgment in Multi-Agent Debate

description: arXiv:2510.10002v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in sensitive everyday contexts -- offering personal advice, mental health support, and moral guidance -- understanding their behavior in navigating complex moral reasoning is essential.
